moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships are in their final days, with semi-finals and finals taking place this week, concluding on July 12th.

angles.name: Men's Semis/Finals
angles.copy: Centre Court drama unfolding at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for the Gentlemen's Singles title this weekend?

angles.name: Ladies' Semis/Finals
angles.copy: The Ladies' Singles final is almost here! Who will lift the Venus Rosewater Dish at Wimbledon 2026?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days on July 12th, with tournament play starting July 16th at Royal Birkdale Golf Club.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major is almost here! The Open Championship practice days kick off this Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready to host The 154th Open. The world's best golfers arrive this weekend for practice ahead of next week's main event.

moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in its thrilling knockout stages this week, with nations battling for a place in the semi-finals and final.

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is building! Who's making it through to the semi-finals? Every match is do-or-die now!

angles.name: Team Support
angles.copy: Which nation are you roaring on in the World Cup knockout stages? The tension is immense!

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, celebrating rock and alternative music, is currently taking place in Gloucestershire until July 11th.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Who's at 2000trees Festival right now? Catching all the best rock and alternative acts in Gloucestershire!

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're not at 2000trees, where's the best place to catch some live rock music this weekend?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park in London on July 11th, featuring a diverse lineup of music and arts.

angles.name: London Festival
angles.copy: London! Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Ally Pally this Saturday. Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival brings dance and electronic music to Newcastle on July 11th.

angles.name: North East Dance
angles.copy: Newcastle, get ready! Lost Minds Festival is this Saturday, bringing huge dance acts to the North East. Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival takes place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland from July 15th to 18th, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Celtic Sounds
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides next week for the Hebridean Celtic Festival? Get ready for some incredible music and island vibes!

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and actress Courtney Love, known for fronting Hole, turns 62 today (born July 9, 1964).

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 62nd to the one and only Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Debbie Sledge turns 72
moments.blurb: American singer Debbie Sledge, best known as a member of Sister Sledge, turns 72 today (born July 9, 1954).

angles.name: Sister Sledge
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 72nd birthday to Debbie Sledge! You can't listen to 'We Are Family' without smiling.

moments.title: Mavis Staples turns 87
moments.blurb: American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, a member of The Staple Singers, turns 87 tomorrow (born July 10, 1939).

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: An absolute legend turns 87 tomorrow! Happy Birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples, voice of The Staple Singers.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on July 11th (born July 11, 1959).

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega on Saturday! 'Luka' is still a masterpiece.

moments.title: Liz Mitchell turns 74
moments.blurb: Jamaican-born British singer Liz Mitchell, the lead vocalist of disco group Boney M., turns 74 on July 12th (born July 12, 1952).

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the iconic voice of Boney M., Liz Mitchell, this Sunday! Get ready to 'Rasputin'!

moments.title: John Petrucci turns 59
moments.blurb: American guitarist John Petrucci, best known as a founding member of the progressive metal band Dream Theater, turns 59 on July 12th (born July 12, 1967).

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Shredding into 59! Happy Birthday this Sunday to the incredible John Petrucci of Dream Theater. What's your favourite Petrucci riff?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt turns 80
moments.blurb: American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her diverse career in rock, folk, pop, and country, turns 80 on July 15th (born July 15, 1946).

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: An incredible 80 years young! Happy Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Monday. Her voice is timeless.

moments.title: Joe Satriani turns 70
moments.blurb: American instrumental rock guitarist Joe Satriani, known for his technical prowess and influential albums, turns 70 on July 15th (born July 15, 1956).

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating 70 years of pure guitar genius! Happy Birthday to Joe Satriani on Monday. What's your favourite Satch track?

moments.title: Olly Alexander turns 36
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor Olly Alexander, known as the frontman of Years & Years and recent Eurovision representative, turns 36 on July 15th (born July 15, 1990).

angles.name: Pop Star
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the charismatic Olly Alexander on Monday! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he always delivers.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across England and Wales begin their summer holidays from July 20th, with Scottish and Northern Irish schools already broken up.

angles.name: School's Out Soon
angles.copy: The countdown is on for summer holidays in England and Wales! School's out from July 20th for many. What are your big plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for some, and just around the corner for others! Time for family fun and sunshine.
